name: Chili Grits
recipeIngredient: 1 Can (14.5 oz) Cream of chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Cook grits in boiling, salted water for 8 minutes.
3. Add butter, cheese, peppers, eggs, soup, and salt; mix well.
4. Spread mixture in a greased 2-quart baking dish.
5. Bake for 1 to 1 1/2 hours, covered for the first 45 minutes.
6. Remove cover and continue baking until lightly browned.
